description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named alot tests that runs on push to master and on pull requests to master. Use a single ubuntu-latest job that checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.9, compiles and installs notmuch from git master because it's not available on ubuntu-latest, installs notmuch2 python bindings, installs alot's dependencies including gnupg2 and python dependencies, and tests with tox.
